room.caption: [G5-3A] NZZ on deck again, here to grace and taunt you with my presence once more.

instance.creationCode: bShowArrow=false exitType=1 newMapX=432 newMapY=144 toRoom=rSamus5_Lv3_D image_xscale=4

sprite_index=sMetSylux image_blend=make_color_rgb(255,128,128) talker="Some Metroid Character" stringToShow="After you charge your beam, look up at your HUD. Ever notice how your bomb display flashes after some time? Try going into morph ball form during this." boxSize=3
if global.gameProgress<=2800 {instance_destroy()}
shopType=oShopWindow shopText="<Its language is indecipherable.>" maxInv=4 inv[0]=13 inv[1]=25 inv[2]=32 inv[3]=37 inv[4]=0 sprite_index=sEtecoon image_xscale=-1
